hook_question: SOMEONE HIJACKED\NLIVE TV FOR\N90 SECONDS.\NTHEN VANISHED.
iconic_detail: A masked figure hijacked two Chicago TV broadcasts mid-program for less than 2 minutes total on the night of November 22, 1987; despite a federal FBI investigation into felony signal intrusion, no one was ever identified or charged.
_voice_name: David Documentary, eleven_multilingual_v2 (NOT rendered this session — see editorial_note)

chapters.voiceover:
November 22nd, 1987, Chicago. During the evening news on WGN-TV, the picture suddenly cuts to static. A masked figure in a Max Headroom costume flickers onto the screen, distorting and buzzing for seconds before engineers manage to cut the signal.

Two hours later it happens again, this time on WTTW, mid-episode of Doctor Who. The intruder rambles nonsense, gets spanked with a flyswatter, and vanishes just as fast.

Broadcast intrusion is a federal felony. The FBI opens an investigation, traces equipment, chases leads for years.

Nobody is ever charged. No one has ever come forward. Whoever hijacked Chicago television for ninety seconds has never been identified.
